description: User clicked the 'Begin task' button to initiate the task.
frame_description: The screen shows a task instruction with a 'Begin task' button highlighted by a heatmap.

description: The screen transitioned from the task start page to the 'Explore' dashboard.
frame_description: The UI changes to show the 'Explore' page with various task opportunities.

description: User paused to examine the 'Explore' page content before interacting further.
frame_description: The user remains on the top section of the Explore page.

description: User scrolled through the 'Explore' page to view different task opportunities, including scrolling down and briefly back up.
frame_description: The page content moves vertically as the user explores the list of opportunities.

description: User hovered over the 'Video call' opportunity card, indicated by the heatmap focus during scrolling.
frame_description: A heatmap appears over the 'Video call' card as the user scrolls past or pauses on it.
